data.title: LINE says it’s not in bed with Sony’s Soneium after all
data.description:
LY Corporation denied that its Web3 venture, Line Next, had entered into a business partnership with Soneium, a Sony-backed Ethereum layer-2 network. The statement, issued on March 28, followed media reports and social media coverage that suggested a partnership had been finalized between LY and Soneium. “These reports were based on an announcement made by Soneium on [March 12] that it plans to expand its business by using the LINE API and LINE Mini Apps on our platform, although no business partnership or the like has been established between Soneium and LY Corporation,” LY said. In response, a Soneium spokesperson told Cointelegraph: “Our March 12 announcement refers to a collaboration, which involves exploring the integration of onchain Mini Apps within the Line ecosystem
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/line-says-it-s-not-in-bed-with-sony-s-soneium-after-all?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: DeAgent AI product AlphaX deploys opBNB, becoming the top DApp in all categories in 24 hours
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News After the expansion and deployment to opBNB, the AlphaX community incubation product of the Web3 AI Agent Infra project DeAgent AI has achieved a user growth rate of 75.38% in the past 24 hours, a surge in transaction volume of 130.66%, a user number of more than 240,000, and more than 1 million transactions processed, becoming the No. 1 DApp in the entire chain and all categories. AlphaX is the first AI model incubated by the community based on the DeAgentAI feedback training mechanism, which can predict the price trends of BTC and ETH. The platform allows users to provide feedback on the prediction results and provide key parameters for continuous optimization of the model.
DeAgent AI is the largest AI agent infrastructure in the Movement, BTC and BSC ecosystems, which can quickly deploy AI models in various segmented scenarios to achieve autonomous decision-making and execution. By utilizing the minimum entropy consensus mechanism to ensure the consensus, unity and continuity of AI agents, promote the adoption of decentralized intelligent consensus mechanisms, and accelerate the transformation of human society to AI-driven.

data.title: Uniswap unlocked tokens seven days ago continue to flow into the exchange, and UNI price fell 6.5%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @EmberCN monitoring, of the 27.9 million UNI transferred out of the Uniswap time-lock contract seven days ago (March 21), another 490,000 UNI (about 3.2 million US dollars) flowed into Binance in the past 5 hours. In the past day or so, 1.24 million UNI (about 8.22 million US dollars) have flowed into Binance. Since the first transfer, the price of UNI has fallen by 6.5% (from $6.8 to $6.3).

data.title: 60,813 ETH transferred to Binance, worth over $116 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to on-chain data, 60,813 ETH (worth approximately US$116 million) were transferred from an unknown wallet to Binance.

data.title: Gate.io HODLer Airdrop Launches Legacy Network(LGCT)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Gate.io will launch Legacy Network (LGCT) spot trading at 21:00 (UTC+8) on March 31, and will start the HODLer Airdrop from 17:00 on March 29 to 17:00 on March 31 (UTC+8). Holders of 1 GT can receive the airdrop for free and share 43,750 LGCT tokens. The upper limit for individual participation is 5,000 GT.

data.title: GameStop Stock Faces Trading Restrictions Amid Surge in Short Volume
data.description: According to PANews, GameStop's stock (GME) has encountered trading restrictions on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) following a significant increase in short trading volume. Reports indicate that the short volume surged by 234% within a 24-hour period, prompting the NYSE to impose these limitations.

data.title: UXLINK Japan and South Korea Club Card (NFT) has sold over 1,100 ETH, with nearly 2,000 cardholders
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News UXLINK announced its Japan and South Korea Social Club Card sales data on the official X platform. More than 1,100 ETH have been sold in two weeks since its launch, and there are nearly 2,000 Japanese and Korean users holding the card.

UXLINK Japan and South Korea Social Club Card is its pilot project in the third season airdrop event, mainly to give back to its Japanese and Korean communities. As an international project headquartered in Tokyo, Japan, UXLINK has a solid community foundation in Japan and South Korea.

The head of the UXLINK community said that from the current Mint, Japanese and Korean users have a high degree of participation, and we may issue international cards in the fourth quarter. In the future, we will give cardholders more rights and interests, enjoy the benefits brought by the entire UXLINK ecosystem, and truly achieve community co-construction.

data.title: Mubarak continues to fall, with a 24-hour drop of 42.8%
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News BSC Ecosystem Meme Coin mubarak continues to fall, with a drop of 42.8% in the past 24 hours. The current market value is 84.1 million US dollars, and the 24-hour trading volume is 309 million US dollars. 
Earlier news, Binance announced the results of the first batch of voting for listing coins in the early morning of today. Mubarak was selected together with BROCCOLI714, TUT, and BANANAS31 and obtained the seed label.

data.title: Trader Says Ethereum-Based Altcoin Primed for 240%+ Rally if Major Resistance Level Breaks, Updates XRP Outlook
data.description:
A widely followed analyst says one decentralized finance (DeFi) token built in the Ethereum (ETH) ecosystem may be gearing up for a massive breakout.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/28/trader-says-ethereum-based-altcoin-primed-for-240-rally-if-major-resistance-level-breaks-updates-xrp-outlook/
